title: Assets (1000 Series) — posting overview
content: 1000 ASSETS (normal debit): 1001 Cash in Hand (physical notes only — NOT eSewa/Khalti). 1002 Bank. 1003 eSewa Wallet. 1004 Khalti. 1005 Fonepay/QR clearing. 1006 IME Pay. 1007 ConnectIPS clearing (transit until bank settles). 1008 Accounts Receivable — credit sale, needs customer name. 1009 Advance to Supplier — money OUT before goods IN (asset). 1010 Inventory/Stock. 1011 Input VAT — only with valid VAT bill. 1012 Prepaid Expenses. 1013 Security Deposit given. 1014-1017 Fixed Assets (furniture, computer, vehicle, machinery). 1018 Accumulated Depreciation (contra-asset, credit balance).

title: Liabilities (2000 Series) — posting overview
content: 2000 LIABILITIES (normal credit): 2001 Accounts Payable — credit purchase, needs supplier name. 2002 Advance Received from customer — money IN before goods OUT (liability). Confused with 1009 — ask who paid whom. 2003 VAT Payable/Output VAT — flag rate with CA/IRD. 2004 TDS Payable — never assume rate. 2005 Salary Payable. 2006 Rent Payable. 2007 Loan Payable — NOT income when received. 2008 Interest Payable. 2009 Other taxes (municipality, license).

title: Equity (3000 Series) — posting overview
content: 3000 EQUITY: 3001 Owner's Capital — owner injects money, NOT income. 3002 Partner's Capital. 3003 Drawings — owner personal withdrawal, NOT expense (ghar kharcha). 3004 Retained Earnings — system calculated at year-end.

title: Income (4000 Series) — posting overview
content: 4000 INCOME (normal credit): 4001 Sales Revenue — cash/credit/wallet sale; reduce inventory. 4002 Service Income. 4003 Discount Received. 4004 Commission Income. 4005 Interest Income. 4006 Other Income (last resort). 4007 Scrap Sales. Do NOT record debtor collection or customer advance as sales.

title: COGS (5000 Series) — posting overview
content: 5000 COGS: 5001 Opening Stock. 5002 Purchases — goods for resale, increases inventory. 5003 Purchase Return (credit). 5004 Freight Inward — part of inventory cost. 5005 Direct Labor (manufacturing). 5006 Closing Stock adjustment. 5007 COGS — derived: Opening + Purchases + Freight + Labor - Returns - Closing.

title: Expenses (6000 Series) — posting overview
content: 6000 EXPENSES (normal debit): 6001 Rent (TDS may apply). 6002 Salary/Wages. 6003 Electricity. 6004 Water. 6005 Internet/Phone. 6006 Repair (vs capitalize if major). 6007 Transport outward. 6008 Fuel. 6009 Packaging. 6010 Printing/Stationery. 6011 Bank charges. 6012 Digital payment fees. 6013 Commission paid. 6014 Advertisement. 6015 Bad debt (confirm before write-off). 6016 Depreciation. 6017 Interest expense (split from loan principal on EMI). 6018 Donation. 6019 Staff meal/tea. 6020 Cleaning. 6021 Miscellaneous — last resort only.
